CustomField.description: Lý do yêu cầu tất toán
CustomField.label: Q8. Reason for Settlement

value.fullName: Want to take out a new loan at FE
value.label: Want to take out a new loan at FE

value.fullName: Need to borrow from another lender
value.label: Need to borrow from another lender

value.fullName: Have sufficient funds to settle/pay off early
value.label: Have sufficient funds to settle/pay off early

value.fullName: Frequent/Excessive fees incurred on the card
value.label: Frequent/Excessive fees incurred on the card

value.fullName: Installment amounts differ from what the sales agent advised
value.label: Installment amounts differ from what the sales agent advised

value.fullName: Loan solicitation or card opening process
value.label: Loan solicitation or card opening process

value.fullName: Have not had the opportunity to take the survey
value.label: Have not had the opportunity to take the survey
